ground_truth.title: iPad Pro
ground_truth.main_content:
Mmmmm. Power.

From $999 or $83.25/mo. for 12 mo. *

or $83.25/mo. for 12 mo.

Get the highlights.

- M5 chip. Furiously fast. The next giant leap for AI on iPad.
- iPadOS 26. Powerfully redesigned. Game-changing capabilities.
- Do more with Apple Intelligence ** — from Image Wand to Live Translation. 1
- Ultra Retina XDR. The world’s most advanced display. Extreme brightness and precise contrast.
- Sleek, lightweight design for ultimate portability and versatility. 5.1 mm 13-inch model

Sleek, lightweight design for ultimate portability and versatility.

5.1 mm

13-inch model
- Advanced features and comfortable typing with Magic Keyboard. Precise creative control with Apple Pencil Pro. 2

Take a closer look.

- View in your space
- Space Black
- Silver

M5. Creator. Accelerator.

The M5 chip pushes the limits of what’s possible on iPad Pro to drive performance and efficiency like never before. A next-generation 10‑core GPU with powerful new Neural Accelerators dramatically speeds up AI tasks — from large language model (LLM) token generation to generative imagery. And the multithreaded CPU performance and faster memory deliver breakthrough speed for your workflows.

Up to 6.7x faster pro rendering performance with ray tracing than iPad Pro with M1 3

Up to 4x faster AI image generation than iPad Pro with M1 4

Learn how M5 powers performance

iPadOS and apps. A tour de workforce.

iPadOS 26 introduces a stunning new design with Liquid Glass and game-changing enhancements that put iPad Pro productivity on a new level. A reimagined, intuitive windowing system gives you greater power and flexibility than ever before. Run pro apps, play high-performance games, and take on creative projects of any size with an intuitive touch-first experience.

Next-level productivity . Open more windows at once, resize and rearrange them your way, and split your screen into thirds or quarters.

Intensive tasks run behind the scenes with Background Tasks . And you can easily manage everything that’s running with Live Activities.

Capture and edit Smart HDR images and up to 4K ProRes video. Open and manipulate larger 3D scenes. And run more complex AI models, all with pro apps .

Explore what you can do on iPad

Apple Intelligence. Works hard. You take it easy.

iPad Pro is built for Apple Intelligence . Create, communicate, and get things done effortlessly with groundbreaking privacy protections at every step. **

Learn more about Apple Intelligence

Do more with the help of Siri and ChatGPT . Explore new visual styles in Image Playground, ask questions about photos and documents, and leverage additional expertise.

Accelerate your workflows with shortcuts, intelligent actions that can summarize text, create images, or tap into Apple Intelligence models.

Use Clean Up to instantly remove unwanted distractions in your photos. Identify the object and remove it with a tap. Or for even greater precision, use your Apple Pencil. 10

Apple Intelligence is designed to protect your privacy at every step. It’s integrated into the core of iPad Pro through on-device processing. So it’s aware of your personal information without collecting your personal information. And with groundbreaking Private Cloud Compute, Apple Intelligence can draw on larger server-based models, running on Apple silicon, to handle more complex requests for you while protecting your privacy.

Ultra Retina XDR. The world’s most advanced display.

Stream Silo on Apple TV+

The Ultra Retina XDR display is built with groundbreaking tandem OLED technology, which generates amazing brightness, precise contrast, and extreme dynamic range performance. Advanced technologies like ProMotion and True Tone give you a jaw-dropping visual experience . And you can use Reference Mode for color-accurate workflows.

jaw-dropping visual experience
- 1000 nits full-screen brightness

full-screen brightness
- 1600 nits peak HDR brightness
- 2,000,000:1 contrast ratio
- True Tone for comfortable viewing

for comfortable viewing
- ProMotion adaptive 10–120Hz refresh rate

adaptive 10–120Hz refresh rate
- P3 wide color

Immerse yourself in Ultra Retina XDR

Design. A powerhouse of portability.

Despite an unbelievably thin and light design, iPad Pro delivers astonishing power and all-day battery life 5 for game-changing productivity. And now with fast charging, get up to 50 percent charge in around 30 minutes. 11

Dive into materials and design

Apple Pencil Pro. Engineered for limitless creativity.

Apple Pencil sets the standard for how drawing, painting, handwriting, and note-taking should feel — intuitive, precise, and magical . All with pixel‑perfect precision, low latency, tilt sensitivity, and support for palm rejection. And Apple Pencil Pro adds even more capabilities to bring your ideas to life like never before. 2

Explore more Apple Pencil features

View Apple Pencil Pro in action

Magic Keyboard. Precision at your fingertips.

Magic Keyboard delivers an amazing typing and trackpad experience in a sleek, portable design with an aluminum palm rest. 12 The keyboard includes a function row and a large glass trackpad with haptic feedback for precise work and Multi‑Touch gestures.

sleek, portable design

Learn more about keyboards for iPad

Tap into the Magic Keyboard

Mics. Cameras. Action.

Shoot, edit, and share all on one device with a pro camera system with LiDAR Scanner, studio-quality mics, and four speakers. Capture 4K ProRes video, record a podcast, and pick the right microphone for each app with the input chooser.

Shoot, edit, and share all on one device
- 12MP Wide camera with adaptive True Tone flash.
- Landscape 12MP Center Stage camera puts you front and center.

Landscape 12MP Center Stage camera
- Studio-quality mics for great video calls.
- Four-speaker sound system for rich audio.

Four-speaker sound system

Explore the camera system

Wi-Fi and cellular. Grab-and-go connectivity.

Workflows go wherever you do with the better performance and reliability of Wi-Fi 7, 13 Bluetooth 6, and Thread — all enabled by N1, our new wireless networking chip.

The second-generation C1X cellular modem supports faster data speeds at greater efficiency while maintaining worldwide 5G coverage. So you can securely access files, communicate with collaborators, and back up data while out and about. 14

Up to 50% faster cellular data performance Wi-Fi 7 5G

Stay connected like a pro

- Learn more in our Product Environmental Report (PDF)

- Manufactured with 55% renewable electricity.
- Ships in 100% fiber-based packaging.

Our values lead the way.

- A plan as innovative as our products. We’re committed to bringing net emissions to zero across our entire carbon footprint by 2030. Learn more about environment
